items.title: Role of Boards in Shareholder Activism – LA CorpGov Forum
items.description: CorpGov is pleased to provide complete video coverage of the inaugural LA CorpGov Forum held on Sept. 4, 2025, at the Edelman Headquarters in the heart of Hollywood. The forum featured over a hundred institutional investors, corporate executives and USC faculty/alumni in an afternoon of panels, firesides and networking. items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Goldman Sachs, T. Rowe Price, BlackRock and JPMorgan
items.description: Goldman Sachs and T. Rowe Price are teaming up to expand private market access, while BlackRock and JPMorgan ramp up alternative investment bets.

items.title: BBHY: High Yield Bond ETF With Growing Distributions
items.description: Discover how JPMorgan BBHY ETF delivers a 7% yield and inflation-aligned distributions. Compare fees, performance, and alternatives.

items.title: PNC to buy Colorado bank for $4.1 billion as part of coast-to-coast push
items.description: Pittsburgh’s PNC Financial Services Group said Monday it reached an agreement to acquire Colorado lender FirstBank for $4.1 billion, moving one of the largest regional banks in the US one step closer to becoming a coast-to-coast brand.
